description_long: This house is a large, rectangular residential building set within a landscaped lot featuring numerous trees and a driveway. The structure has a prominent gable roof covered in gray shingles, with the main facade showcasing a wide expanse of glass windows and a central entryway. The rear of the house includes a fenced area, possibly a backyard or recreational space, and the property is bordered by paved roads and sidewalks. The landscaping is lush, with mature trees and manicured shrubs providing privacy and aesthetic appeal. The house appears to have a modern yet traditional architectural style, with clean lines and a balanced window arrangement. The property also includes a detached garage or auxiliary building near the entrance drive.
description: A large, gable-roofed house with expansive glass windows, surrounded by trees and a driveway, featuring a modern-traditional design and a detached garage.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side and rear of the house, showing the gable roof, backyard area, and dense tree coverage along the property edge.
description_view_1: The front facade is visible here, with large glass windows, the main entryway, and a driveway leading to a detached garage.
description_view_2: This angle shows the opposite side and rear, with more trees, a fenced area, and the side elevation of the house.
description_view_3: The back of the house is visible, including the full length of the gable roof and a fenced recreational area, with the driveway and street in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows on the front facade
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with wide glass doors, minimal steps, and a covered overhang, flanked by landscaped plantings
